tasks.subject: Task 1: Core helpers (AssetFetchError + assets.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add new error type and pure helpers used by all three engines. No engine touched.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/errors.py:44`
- Create: `src/kinoforge/core/assets.py`
- Create: `tests/core/test_assets.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- AssetFetchError subclasses KinoforgeError
- find_asset returns match/None/raises on duplicate
- asset_bytes dispatches http(s) vs file vs unsupported
- set_by_dot_path writes at nested paths
- 10 tests pass

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_assets.py -v && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/errors.py", "src/kinoforge/core/assets.py", "tests/core/test_assets.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_assets.py -v && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AssetFetchError subclasses KinoforgeError", "find_asset returns match/None/raises on duplicate", "asset_bytes dispatches http(s) vs file vs unsupported", "set_by_dot_path writes at nested paths", "10 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Diffusers asset wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Diffusers submit() reads segments[0].assets, finds role match, writes URI into request body at the configured dot-path. URL passthrough.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/__init__.py — Backend __init__ (135-158), submit (176-187), Engine __init__/backend (~327)/validate_spec (383-403)
- Modify: tests/engines/test_diffusers.py — 4 new tests

**Acceptance Criteria:** DiffusersBackend asset_paths kwarg; Engine.backend reads cfg.engine.diffusers.asset_paths; submit writes at dot-path; submit does not fetch bytes; validate_spec rejects unmapped role; all prior + 4 new pass.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_diffusers.py -v && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/__init__.py", "tests/engines/test_diffusers.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_diffusers.py -v && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["DiffusersBackend.__init__ accepts asset_paths kwarg", "submit writes URI at dot-path", "submit does not fetch bytes", "validate_spec rejects undeclared role", "all prior tests + 4 new pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Hosted asset wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Hosted submit() reads cfg.engine.hosted.asset_paths, writes URI into POST body at configured dot-path. Supports nested dot-paths.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/engines/hosted/__init__.py — Backend __init__ (190-217), submit (235-245), Engine __init__/backend (430+)/validate_spec (486-505)
- Modify: tests/engines/test_hosted.py — 4 new tests

**Acceptance Criteria:** HostedAPIBackend asset_paths kwarg; Engine.backend reads cfg; submit writes at nested dot-path; submit does not fetch bytes; validate_spec rejects unmapped role; all prior + 4 new pass.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_hosted.py -v && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/hosted/__init__.py", "tests/engines/test_hosted.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_hosted.py -v && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HostedAPIBackend.__init__ accepts asset_paths kwarg", "submit writes URI at nested dot-path", "submit does not fetch bytes", "validate_spec rejects undeclared role", "all prior tests + 4 new pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: ComfyUI asset wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ComfyUI submit() fetches asset bytes, uploads via /upload/image, patches LoadImage node's inputs.image via node_overrides. New seams: http_get_bytes + http_post_file on Backend.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/engines/comfyui/__init__.py — _urllib_post_multipart module-level default; Backend __init__ (172-194); submit (213-238); Engine __init__ (319+)/backend (419-443)/validate_spec (471-490)
- Modify: tests/engines/test_comfyui.py — 8 new tests

**Acceptance Criteria:** Backend new seams; default _urllib_post_multipart parses {"name":...}; submit uploads + patches node_overrides; AssetFetchError wraps fetch + upload failures; validate_spec rejects unmapped role; pre-Layer-F regression-free; 8 tests pass.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_comfyui.py -v && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/comfyui/__init__.py", "tests/engines/test_comfyui.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_comfyui.py -v && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ComfyUIBackend.__init__ gains http_get_bytes + http_post_file seams", "submit uploads bytes + patches node_overrides", "AssetFetchError wraps fetch and upload failures", "validate_spec rejects unmapped role", "all prior tests + 8 new pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: GenerateClipStage post-chain validate_spec
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Stage calls engine.validate_spec(job) after inject_tail_frame so misconfigured asset_node_ids/asset_paths surface before the engine HTTP round-trip.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/pipeline/generate_clip.py — after line 118
- Modify: tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py — 3 new tests

**Acceptance Criteria:** validate_spec called once per post-chain job; existing chain test still passes; stage aborts on validate_spec raise (no segment-i+1 dispatch); spy engine confirms asset reaches submit on chained iterations.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py -v && pixi run test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/pipeline/generate_clip.py", "tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py -v && pixi run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["stage calls validate_spec once per post-chain job", "asset reaches engine.submit on chained iterations", "stage aborts on validate_spec raise", "all prior + 3 new pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Docs + PROGRESS + final verification + merge
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update README + PROGRESS, run full quality gate, merge via --no-ff.

**Files:**
- Modify: README.md — replace Layer F limitation callout; document asset_paths/asset_node_ids
- Modify: PROGRESS.md — Phase 16 entry; Single next action update

**Acceptance Criteria:** README Layer F section replaced; Diffusers/Hosted/ComfyUI examples added; PROGRESS Phase 16 entry mirroring Phase 14/15 style; Single next action updated; full gate clean; merge commit on main.

**Verify:** `pixi run test && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README Layer F callout replaced with asset wiring section", "PROGRESS Phase 16 entry added", "Single next action updated", "full quality gate clean", "merge commit lands on main"]}
```
